mapper.insert: insert into photo(user_id, title, description, tags, image_url, create_time, update_time) values (#{userId},#{title},#{description},#{tags},#{imageUrl},#{createTime},#{updateTime})
mapper.select: select p.id, p.user_id, u.username, p.title, p.description, p.tags, p.image_url, p.create_time from photo p join user_account u on u.id = p.user_id where p.id = #{id} limit 1
select p.id, p.user_id, u.username, p.title, p.description, p.tags, p.image_url, p.create_time from photo p join user_account u on u.id = p.user_id order by p.create_time desc
select p.id, p.user_id, u.username, p.title, p.description, p.tags, p.image_url, p.create_time from photo p join user_account u on u.id = p.user_id order by p.create_time desc

select p.id, p.user_id, u.username, p.title, p.description, p.tags, p.image_url, p.create_time from photo p join user_account u on u.id = p.user_id where p.id in
#{id}

select p.id, p.user_id, u.username, p.title, p.description, p.tags, p.image_url, p.create_time from photo p join user_account u on u.id = p.user_id where p.user_id = #{userId} order by p.create_time desc
mapper.delete: delete from photo where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select p.id, p.user_id, u.username, p.title, p.description, p.tags, p.image_url, p.create_time from photo_like l join photo p on p.id = l.photo_id join user_account u on u.id = p.user_id where l.user_id = #{userId} order by l.create_time desc

select p.id, p.user_id, u.username, p.title, p.description, p.tags, p.image_url, p.create_time from photo_favorite f join photo p on p.id = f.photo_id join user_account u on u.id = p.user_id where f.user_id = #{userId} order by f.create_time desc

select p.id, p.user_id, u.username, p.title, p.description, p.tags, p.image_url, p.create_time from photo_comment c join photo p on p.id = c.photo_id join user_account u on u.id = p.user_id where c.user_id = #{userId} group by p.id, p.user_id, u.username, p.title, p.description, p.tags, p.image_url, p.create_time order by max(c.create_time) desc
